meta.description: Wild Rift Jungle champion data – updated with QWER skill references, pick/avoid examples, and clear/rotation guides

champions.name: Amumu

goodAgainst.name: AD heavy teams
goodAgainst.note: Tankiness vs AD with armor stacking

pickWhen: Team needs teamfight CC and engage
Enemy has AD heavy comp (e.g., Zed, Yasuo, Graves)
You have follow-up damage (e.g., Miss Fortune, Orianna)
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile burst (e.g., Lee Sin, Evelynn)
Enemy has AP heavy comp (e.g., Diana, Lillia)
Your team lacks damage to follow up on your engage
champions.tips: Flash + R is your engage. Build armor vs AD. Use Q to gap close.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for R engages post-6. Ult when enemies are grouped. Use Q + R for multi-man CC.

champions.name: Diana

goodAgainst.name: Kindred
goodAgainst.note: Out-trades her; burst her with R

badAgainst.name: Vi
badAgainst.note: Out-duels her; can R her out of engage

pickWhen: Need AP dive and burst
Enemy has clustered fights (e.g., immobile carries)
Your team has engage to set up your R
avoidWhen: Enemy has strong CC (e.g., Lissandra, Pantheon)
Enemy has peel supports (e.g., Janna, Lulu)
champions.tips: Use Q to poke, E to engage. R pulls enemies in for massive burst.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for E + R engages. Flash + R for multi-man pulls. Reset passive for burst.

champions.name: Ekko

goodAgainst.name: Graves
goodAgainst.note: Out-mobiles him; dodge his burst with R

badAgainst.name: Vi
badAgainst.note: Out-duels him; can R him out of engage

pickWhen: Need skill expression and outplay potential
Enemy has immobile carries (e.g., Lux, Jinx)
You want a safe assassin with escape (R)
avoidWhen: Enemy has lockdown CC (e.g., Lissandra, Pantheon)
Enemy has tanks that survive your burst (e.g., Galio)
champions.tips: Use W for shield/stun. R to undo damage and reposition.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for W stuns. E + Q + auto for burst. Use R to escape or re-engage.

champions.name: Evelynn

badAgainst.name: Heavy vision teams
badAgainst.note: Can't gank due to control wards

pickWhen: Need stealth picks and assassination
Enemy has squishy carries (e.g., Lux, Jinx, Ziggs)
You want to snowball early
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy vision (control wards, sweepers)
Enemy has tanks (e.g., Ornn, Malphite, Rammus)
champions.tips: Charm (W) from stealth. R to execute and escape.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Wait for passive stealth. Use W to charm. R to execute. Look for isolated targets.

champions.name: Graves
pickWhen: Need early invade and pressure
Enemy has melee junglers (e.g., Xin Zhao, Warwick)
Your team needs AD damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy CC (e.g., Nautilus, Lissandra)
champions.tips: Use Q + auto combo. Build bruiser or crit.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for invades. Q + auto for burst. E for repositioning.

champions.name: Jarvan IV
pickWhen: Need gank setup and engage
Enemy has immobile carries (e.g., Jinx, Lux)
Your team has follow-up damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile champions (e.g., Ezreal, Akali)
champions.tips: EQ for knockup. R to trap carries.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for early ganks. EQ + W + R for lockdown. Flash + EQ for surprise engage.

champions.name: Kayn

badAgainst.name: Tanks
badAgainst.note: Can't kill them early (e.g., Rammus, Amumu)

pickWhen: Need scaling advantage and form flexibility
You can choose form based on enemy comp (Shadow vs squishy, Darkin vs tanks)
Enemy has squishy carries
avoidWhen: Enemy has early pressure (e.g., Lee Sin, Pantheon)
Enemy has heavy CC to lock you down
Your team needs early game pressure
champions.tips: Choose form based on enemy comp. Farm to evolve.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Farm to evolve. Look for ganks after form. Shadow form for burst, Darkin for sustain.

champions.name: Kindred
pickWhen: Need scaling marksman in jungle
Need marks stacking for late game
Your team has peel and frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has burst assassins (e.g., Lee Sin, Rengar, Zed)
champions.tips: Stack marks on enemies. R to save allies.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for marks on enemy camps. Q for mobility. R to save carries.

champions.name: Lee Sin
pickWhen: Need early pressure and invade potential
You want to make Insec plays on enemy carries
Your team has follow-up damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has tanky CC comps (e.g., Rammus, Malphite)
Enemy has heavy peel (e.g., Janna, Braum)
Your team needs late game scaling
champions.tips: Q into R + Flash for Insec. Ward hop for mobility.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for early ganks. Ward hop (W) for mobility. Insec (R) carries. Invade enemy jungle.

champions.name: Lillia
pickWhen: Need scaling teamfight and AP damage
Enemy has tanks you can shred with Q
Your team has frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has early snowball (e.g., Lee Sin, Pantheon)
Enemy has burst assassins (e.g., Rengar, Evelynn)
champions.tips: Q + sleep for ganks. R to engage teamfights.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Farm to scale. Look for Q + R engages. R to sleep enemy team.

champions.name: Master Yi
pickWhen: Game will go late
Enemy has low CC (e.g., Lux, Ziggs, Jinx)
Your team has peel and frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy CC (e.g., Lissandra, Leona, Nautilus)
champions.tips: Q to dodge. Auto resets with W. Build on-hit.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Farm to scale. Look for picks with Q. Use R for engage/escape. Focus on resetting passive.

champions.name: Nautilus
pickWhen: Need CC setup and engage
Enemy has immobile carries (e.g., Jinx, Lux)
Your team has follow-up damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile pokers (e.g., Ezreal, Zyra)
champions.tips: Hook (Q) + auto root + E slow is your combo.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for early ganks. Q + auto + E for CC. R to lock down carries.

champions.name: Nidalee
pickWhen: Need skill poke and invade pressure
Enemy has squishy carries (e.g., Lux, Jinx)
You want to snowball early
avoidWhen: Enemy has hard CC (e.g., Pantheon, Lissandra)
champions.tips: Land spears (Q) for damage. Use heal (E) to sustain.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for early invades and ganks. Land Q (spear) for burst. Use E for sustain.

champions.name: Olaf
pickWhen: Need sustain in fights and all-in potential
Enemy has melee champions you can out-trade
Your team needs frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy kite (e.g., Ezreal, Ashe, Janna)
Enemy has champions that can disengage (e.g., Gragas)
champions.tips: Use R for CC immunity. Q + auto for damage.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for early invades. R to counter CC. E for true damage. Sustain with W.

champions.name: Pantheon
pickWhen: Need early game pressure and roam
Enemy has squishy junglers (e.g., Nidalee, Evelynn)
Your team has follow-up damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has tanks that survive your burst (e.g., Galio, Rammus)
champions.tips: Use R to roam. Empowered W for stun.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for early ganks. R for cross-map pressure. W for stun. E for block.

champions.name: Rammus
pickWhen: Enemy has AD auto attackers (e.g., Master Yi, Tryndamere, Yasuo)
Need tank vs AD
Your team has AP damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has AP heavy comp (e.g., Diana, Lillia, Ekko)
champions.tips: Build armor. Taunt (E) key targets.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for ganks with Q (speed). E (taunt) key auto attackers. R for AoE slow.

champions.name: Rengar
pickWhen: Need bush control and burst
Enemy has squishy carries (e.g., Lux, Jinx, Ziggs)
You want to snowball early
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy vision (control wards, sweepers)
champions.tips: Use bushes for leaps. R for stealth ganks.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for bush leaps. R for stealth ganks. Burst with Q + E.

champions.name: Shyvana
pickWhen: Need scaling dragon control
Need teamfight damage
Your team has frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has early burst (e.g., Lee Sin, Pantheon)
champions.tips: Control dragons for passive. R for engage.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Farm and prioritize dragons. R for engage. E for poke.

champions.name: Skarner
pickWhen: Need frontline and point-click CC (R)
Enemy has immobile carries (e.g., Jinx, Lux)
Your team has follow-up damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy kite (e.g., Ezreal, Ashe, Janna)
champions.tips: Impale (R) key targets. Build tanky.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for picks with R. E for slow/stun. Sustain with W.

champions.name: Vi
pickWhen: Need dive engage and gank pressure
Enemy has immobile carries (e.g., Jinx, Lux)
Your team has follow-up damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has mobile comps (e.g., Ezreal, Akali)
champions.tips: Q + R for engage. Shield passive for sustain.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for early ganks. Q + R for engage. W for sustained damage.

champions.name: Viego
pickWhen: Need scaling carry and possession value
Enemy has clustered fights where you can reset
Your team has frontline
avoidWhen: Enemy has lockdown CC (e.g., Lissandra, Leona, Nautilus)
champions.tips: Possess enemies for extra value. Build bruiser.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Farm to scale. Look for picks and resets. Possess enemies after kills.

champions.name: Volibear
pickWhen: Need sustain in fights and frontline
Enemy has melee champions you can out-sustain
Your team needs engage
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy kite (e.g., Ezreal, Ashe, Janna)
Enemy has AP comp (e.g., Diana, Lillia)
champions.tips: W for sustain. R for tower disable.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for ganks. W for sustain. R to tower dive. E for AoE damage.

champions.name: Warwick
pickWhen: Need sustain in fights and map pressure
Enemy has low HP targets (bloodhunt)
Your team needs engage
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy kite (e.g., Ezreal, Ashe, Janna)
champions.tips: Bloodhunt for low enemies. R to engage.
champions.clearPath: Blue Buff → Gromp → Wolves → Raptors → Red Buff → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for low HP targets. Q for sustain. R to engage. E for fear.

champions.name: Wukong
pickWhen: Need engage and flex pick
Enemy has many melee champions
Your team has follow-up damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has specific counters (e.g., Lee Sin, Vi)
champions.tips: Use clone (W) to bait. R to knock up enemies.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for ganks. W for clone bait. R for engage and knockup.

champions.name: Xin Zhao
pickWhen: Need early pressure and gank potential
Enemy has squishy junglers (e.g., Nidalee, Kindred)
Your team has follow-up damage
avoidWhen: Enemy has heavy CC (e.g., Nautilus, Lissandra)
champions.tips: Q for knockup. W for slow. R for engage.
champions.clearPath: Red Buff → Raptors → Wolves → Blue Buff → Gromp → Gank/Scuttle
champions.rotation: Look for early ganks. Q + W for CC. E for gap close. R for disengage.

draftRules.text: Tanks like Rammus and Amumu counter AD junglers. Build armor and survive the early game.
Assassins like Evelynn, Rengar, and Kayn excel against immobile carries. Look for picks.
AP junglers like Lillia, Diana, and Nidalee shred tanks. Build magic damage.
Engage supports and control mages pair well with dive junglers like Vi, Jarvan, and Lee Sin.
Carry junglers need frontline. Consider a tank jungler or ask team for frontline.
Early game junglers will look for early ganks. Ward and play safe early.
Strong early junglers will invade. Coordinate with lanes for vision and response.
Scaling junglers like Master Yi and Shyvana struggle against early pressure. Farm safe and concede early objectives.
Strong dragon control junglers. Prioritize early drakes for team buffs.
Early game junglers should prioritize Rift Herald for turret plates and snowball.
Strong early junglers will invade you. Place wards at your buffs and ask for help from lanes.
